economic_notes: Nation owns interests in Harrison Salmon Producers Limited Partnership (50%), Sts'ailes Eco Energy Development (Sakwi) Limited Partnership (99%), and Sts'ailes Eco Energy Development (Bremner Trio) Limited Partnership (99%) accounted for by modified equity method. Revenue streams include hydro, forestry, fisheries, and eco-lodge operations. Long-term loans receivable of $5,622,200 issued to Bremner Trio LP at 13% and 10% interest.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2022 (not 2024). Five entities fully consolidated including Sts'ailes Development Limited Partnership, Sts'ailes Development Corporation, Sasquatch Crossing Eco Lodge Ltd, SLD Land Holdings Inc. (two entities). Three GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. Large accounts receivable jump from $1.875M to $10.242M driven by new loans and receivables. Deferred revenue increased significantly by $6.17M primarily due to deferred Province of BC funding of $6.377M. Term loans due on demand of $2,456,783 also exist in addition to long-term debt. Annual debt service reflects repayment of long-term debt only; total financing repayments including bank indebtedness and demand loans were $1,269,937. No schedule of remuneration disclosed. Defined contribution pension plan contributions were $333,717.
